openrouter:openai/gpt-5.6-luna.answer:
No credible source gives the **exact number of votes cast against** the merger.

The available reports state only that:

- **Farm Supply Company members approved it with 97% voting in favor**.
- **More than 90% of the combined shareholder base** voted in favor.
